data.title: Continuous Security Testing
data.description: Regular security testing to identify and mitigate vulnerabilities.
data.technical_spec: Automated penetration testing tools integrated into CI/CD pipelines.

data.title: Encryption Standards
data.description: Strict encryption of data both in transit and at rest.
data.technical_spec: AES-256 encryption for data at rest and TLS 1.2+ for data in transit.

data.title: Threat Detection and Response
data.description: Proactive monitoring and response to cyber threats.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes machine learning-driven threat intelligence and anomaly detection tools.

data.title: Access Control and Identity Management
data.description: Comprehensive identity and access management (IAM) to control user access.
data.technical_spec: Single Sign-On (SSO), Multi-Factor Authentication (MFA), and role-based access controls.

data.title: Security Compliance
data.description: Adherence to global security standards and regulations.
data.technical_spec: Compliance with standards such as GDPR, ISO 27001, and PCI DSS.
